body_and_letters.usage: The giant letter pair, algorithms, technical data, Speffz scheme

visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px solid borders (#333333) instead of soft shadows. Inner glow 1px for active states.
visual_enhancers.borders: border-white/10 for neutral, border-success/50 for correct feedback.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) to break the digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid colors only. No glassmorphism here because of the 'tactical performance' requirement. Transparency allowed only for modal overlays (backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/80).

letter_pair_display.styling: Massive JetBrains Mono text, absolutely centered via Flexbox. Color transitions instantly based on correctness: Default (White), Correct (Neon Green flash), Incorrect (Electric Red flash + Shake).

connection_panel.styling: Top left. Pill-shaped badge. Dot indicator: Green (Connected), Red (Disconnected), Yellow (Connecting). Font: JetBrains Mono text-sm.

mode_switcher.styling: Segmented control in the top center. Minimalist borders. Active state gets a 1px inner border of #007AFF and elevated background.

live_session_hud.description: Current streak, cases solved, accuracy %, CPM
live_session_hud.styling: Bottom or side grid. High density. 'Grid Borders' style: expose the skeleton with border-r border-t border-white/10. Labels: Barlow Condensed overline. Values: JetBrains Mono.

cube_visualization.styling: Flat 2D unrolled net view. True Rubik's colors with 1px black or dark grey gaps between stickers. The buffer and two target stickers highlighted, others dimmed (opacity 0.3 or grayscale).

settings_drawer.styling: Slide out from right. Solid #141414 background. border-l border-white/10. Standard Shadcn customized forms (Switch, Select).

stats_view.description: Total cases trained, time spent, best day, per-case timing
stats_view.styling: A dense grid utilizing the 'High Density Grid' (gap-4 or gap-6). Text in Barlow Condensed for large metrics. Recharts with minimal axes for graphs.

grids_and_layouts.spacing_system: Generous spacing overall, but tight grouping for related stats. p-4 to p-8 for containers. HUD uses tight gap-4 high-density grid.
grids_and_layouts.hero_layout: Full viewport height layout (h-screen). Top bar for controls, Center for the Letter Pair (flex-grow), Bottom/Sides for HUD. Avoid scrolling on the main training screen.

motion.correct_action: Instant text color change to #39FF14, scale up by 1.05 for 100ms, then swap to new letters and scale back. Speed is critical.
motion.incorrect_action: Text color to #FF3B30, horizontal shake animation (translateX -10px, 10px).
motion.general: Micro-interactions on hover (bg-white/5), no slow transitions. Keep transition times under 150ms for a snappy feel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep black meets APCA standards. Rubik's colors on dark background MUST have a dark stroke (#000) around them to avoid bleeding or contrast issues.
accessibility.keyboard: Full keyboard navigation support, critical for manual practice fallback. Use specific keystrokes (e.g., Space to reveal/skip, Enter to submit).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts: Barlow Condensed and JetBrains Mono.
Implement the main training view as a non-scrolling, viewport-filling app (h-screen).
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for the main layout to ensure absolute control over the massive letter display and grid alignments.
Use Shadcn UI for the Settings Drawer, Dialogs, and Selects.
Ensure the central letter pair dominates the screen and uses fluid typography (e.g., clamp(5rem, 15vw, 20rem)).
Implement Web Bluetooth logic cleanly, separating UI state from Bluetooth events.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive and informational elements.
Strictly follow the color palette, especially the exact Rubik's cube colors provided.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT center align the app container. Keep text-alignment semantic.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for overlays or dropdowns. Always use bg-surface (#141414) or dark glass (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md).
Add micro-animations for hover states and transitions.

data_testids.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.
